use_cases: Premium user profile cards in SaaS dashboards with interactive 3D depth effects
Feature highlight cards on landing pages with frosted glass aesthetic
Product showcase cards in e-commerce with mouse-tracking parallax
Interactive widget components for modern media applications
Call-to-action cards in marketing pages with premium glass effect
ai_summary: An interactive frosted glass card component featuring 3D rotation effects that follow mouse position, creating depth and premium visual appeal. Uses glassmorphism styling with backdrop blur effects, smooth transitions, and a responsive layout with rounded corners and shadow depth. Ideal for modern SaaS dashboards, landing pages, and premium product showcases requiring interactive UI elements.
